posts.author: Giorgio (Giorgio Sadolfo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi at all,

we are going with a global implementation of Monday.com and I would like to create an automation where for every workspaces or boards the people create the support team is added as owner and subscribed to all boards in order to view all the contents. Is it possible?
